role: Golden treatments for panel_family.rs — shellMode resolves one PanelTreatment (fill/blur/border/radius/elevation) applied to every panel node shell-wide.
source: ShellSettingsService.shellMode (port-data/shell_settings.json group panel_family, options_ref shellModeFamilies — backend ships the list dynamically; these 4 are the canonical set)
note: No panel hard-codes its look; each reads the resolved treatment. Central threads famBg/famBlur/famBorder/famRadius/famShadow into the sidebar + launcher live, with a 4-swatch preview in the General section.
